extract: Ginkgo Landing (Japanese: イチョウの浜辺 Ginkgo Beach) is an area located in the western region of the Cobalt Coastlands of Hisui. It is east of Crossing Slope, west of Tranquility Cove, and south of Windbreak Stand. This is where the player first meets the Ride Basculegion with the help of the warden Iscan of the Diamond Clan. The Miss Fortune sisters make their second confrontation here, stealing the sibling of the late Lord Arcanine's son.
